myDonationTurn.title: My Donation Turn
myDonationTurn.noTurn: You don't have a donation turn scheduled. Browse institutions and apply to join!
myDonationTurn.question: Will you donate this week?
myDonationTurn.declineInfo: If you decline, your turn will automatically be passed to the next donator.

howItWorks.title: How the Rotation Works
steps: You're part of a rotation with other donators
When it's your turn, you'll receive a notification
You can accept to donate or decline to skip
If you decline, it automatically goes to the next donator
The rotation continues until all donators complete their turns
